g.text: Ensures users can only access their own rows
Applied to: users, profiles, sessions, audit_logs (SELECT)
Applied to: all tables (webhooks, notifications, batch jobs)
Records archived via status flag, not removed
Applied to: data requiring recovery capability
INSERT: service_role only | UPDATE/DELETE: deny all
Logs cannot be tampered with after creation
ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
Policies must be simple for query optimization
Service creds in env config | Schema version controlled
Total: 25 Functional Requirements | 4 Standard Patterns | 5 Requirement Groups | 4 Edge Cases
